attributes.readMe:
# Booking Card ## Summary The `Booking` card represents a booking or reservation, such as for a hotel, restaurant, or event. It contains information about the booking, including the start and end dates, the number of guests, and potentially other details. ## Import ```javascript import { Booking } from '../booking'; ``` ## Usage as a Field You can use the `Booking` card as a field within a consuming card or field. For example: ```javascript import { CardDef, field } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api'; export class MyCard extends CardDef { @field(Booking) booking: Booking; } ``` This defines a `booking` field of type `Booking` within the `MyCard` card definition. ## Template Usage Within the template of a consuming card or field, you can display the details of the `Booking` card like this: ```handlebars

{{@fields.booking.startDate}} - {{@fields.booking.endDate}}

Guests: {{@fields.booking.guests}}

{{#if @fields.booking.other}}

{{@fields.booking.other}}

{{/if}}
``` This will display the start and end dates, the number of guests, and any other information stored in the `Booking` card.
